title: Nepal Election Results 2026 Live: Balen Shah’s RSP leads on 98 seats, rivals trail far behind
content:
Live results for the Nepal Election 2026 are currently being reported.
*   Balen Shah’s RSP is holding a strong lead.
*   The party has secured 98 seats, with rivals trailing significantly behind.

title: Business leaders call for stronger ecosystems that empower women at Thaaragai 2026 summit
content:
Business leaders advocated for the empowerment of women.
*   They specifically called for the creation of stronger, supportive "ecosystems" to achieve this goal.
*   This initiative took place during the Thaaragai 2026 summit.

title: T.N. institutions have completed almost all projects funded under RUSA: Union Joint Secretary
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Tamil Nadu (T.N.) institutions have completed almost all projects.
*   These projects were funded under the Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA) scheme.
*   This high completion rate was confirmed by a Union Joint Secretary.

title: Minister lays foundation for two check dams across Palar, Ponnai near Katpadi
content:
A Minister has laid the foundation stone for a new project.
*   The project involves the construction of two check dams.
*   These dams will be built across the Palar and Ponnai rivers, near Katpadi.

title: Southern Railway conducts trial run of AC suburban train on Chennai-Arakkonam section
content:
Southern Railway conducted a trial run.
*   The trial involved an air-conditioned (AC) suburban train.
*   The test was carried out on the Chennai-Arakkonam railway section.

title: TNExpat platform launched to provide expats a peek into life, culture in T.N.
content:
A new platform called TNExpat has been launched.
*   It is specifically designed for expats.
*   The platform aims to provide insights into life and culture in Tamil Nadu (T.N.).

title: Campaign against sexual violence launched
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   A new campaign has been officially launched.
*   Its primary focus is to combat and address sexual violence.
*   This initiative marks the start of organized efforts against the issue.

title: Natural farming can make agriculture profitable and sustainable, says Minister
content:
A Minister advocates for the adoption of natural farming methods.
*   Natural farming is presented as a key strategy to enhance agricultural profitability.
*   It is also highlighted as an essential path towards achieving sustainable agriculture.

title: Tamil Nadu releases Government Order to regulate cosmetology, aesthetics, and hair transplant clinics
content:
The Tamil Nadu government has issued a new Government Order (GO).
*   The purpose of this GO is to regulate various clinics.
*   These regulations specifically target cosmetology, aesthetics, and hair transplant services.

title: Jawahirullah urges Union government to roll back LPG price hike
content:
Jawahirullah has urged the Union government.
*   The call is in response to the recent hike in LPG prices.
*   He is demanding a rollback of these increased prices.
